acip Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual acip Directory Reference(3)

NAME

acip Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file acds.h
ascii-chat Discovery Service (ACDS) Protocol Message Formats file acds_client.h
ACIP client-side protocol library and ACDS client connection API. file acds_handlers.h
ACIP Discovery Server (ACDS) packet handlers. file acds_server.h
ACIP server-side protocol library and ACDS server utilities. file client.h
ACIP client-side protocol API. file handlers.h
ACIP protocol packet handlers (transport-agnostic). file messages.h
ACIP protocol message structures and helpers. file protocol.h
ascii-chat Binary Network Protocol (complete system including ACIP discovery service) file send.h
ACIP shared/bidirectional packet sending functions. file server.h
ACIP server-side protocol API. file transport.h
Transport abstraction layer for ACIP protocol.

Version 0.9.19 ascii-chat
